tools.name: resources.getAreas
tools.description: Lists the geographical areas (e.g. districts) that can be used to filter events.

tools.name: resources.getEvents
tools.description: The events resource provides information about road events (e.g. accidents, construction, special events). The response is a list of event elements matching the filtering parameters if any are provided.

tools.name: resources.getJurisdiction
tools.description: Lists the jurisdictions publishing data through this Open511 API implementation

tools.name: resources.getJurisdictiongeography
tools.description: Provides the geographical boundaries for all the jurisdictions.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
